purpose: L3 constraint layer: fiber/base loop distinction, Berry connection, transport, Weyl chirality L/R anti-alignment

L3_constraints.fiber_loop: S1 fiber = U(1) gauge orbit. Unobservable. Winding number pi_1(S1)=Z.
L3_constraints.base_loop: S1 base = path on Bloch sphere S2. Observable. Berry phase = holonomy.
L3_constraints.berry_connection: A = (1-cos(theta))/2 dphi. Parallel transport along base loops.
L3_constraints.transport: Between-ring edges connect nested torus levels. Required for dynamics.

chirality.definition: L and R Weyl spinors live in conjugate reps of SU(2).
chirality.bipartition: L/R creates natural 2-subsystem split for entanglement.

closed_loop_equator.conclusion: Berry phase for closed equatorial loop = pi. Well-defined, gauge-invariant.

open_path_half_equator.conclusion: Open path phases are gauge-dependent in principle. Only CLOSED loops give gauge-invariant Berry phase.
open_path_half_equator.kills: Any lego assuming open-path Berry phase is gauge-dependent -> not physical observable.

fiber_loop_trivial.conclusion: Loop purely along fiber gives phase = 2*pi (trivial mod 2*pi). No holonomy. Berry phase requires BASE loop.

charge_conjugation_map.conclusion: C maps L to R. <L|R>=0 always. Bloch vectors antipodal (dot=-1).

random_LR_tests.conclusion: For ALL pure states, C(psi) is orthogonal and Bloch-antipodal. This is ALGEBRAIC, not statistical.

real_restriction.conclusion: For REAL states, charge conjugation = epsilon rotation. No chirality, just SO(2) rotation. TRUE chirality requires complex structure where conjugation acts nontrivially on phases.
real_restriction.kills: Real-only representations have no chirality -> kill real-only legos that claim chirality.

sigma_y_uniqueness.conclusion: sigma_y is the ONLY Pauli with imaginary entries. It IS the L<->R map. This is why concurrence uses sigma_y and ONLY sigma_y.

concurrence_uses_chirality.conclusion: Concurrence formula: rho_tilde = (sy x sy) rho* (sy x sy). The sy IS charge conjugation C. Concurrence = overlap with charge-conjugated state. This is NOT arbitrary -- chirality FORCES the use of sy.

negativity_chirality_link.conclusion: Partial transpose on one subsystem detects entanglement. In L/R chirality split, the two subsystems are related by C, so PT has direct chirality interpretation.

LR_product_vs_entangled.conclusion: L/R anti-aligned product states have ZERO entanglement entropy. Entangled states always have nonzero EE. The chirality bipartition makes entanglement detection CLEAN.

path_dependent_transport.conclusion: Open-path transport phases differ by path -> connection has CURVATURE. This is impossible on flat space where all connections are flat.

curvature_from_small_loops.conclusion: Holonomy proportional to enclosed area = curvature != 0. Flat topology (R2) has zero curvature -> zero holonomy for ALL loops. Transport on sphere is FUNDAMENTALLY different from flat transport.

cell_complex_requirement.inner_ring: S1 fiber = gauge orbit at fixed base point
cell_complex_requirement.outer_ring: S1 base = equator or other base loop
cell_complex_requirement.between_ring_edges: Paths from one theta to another = between-ring transport
cell_complex_requirement.connection_on_edges: Berry connection A defines parallel transport along edges
cell_complex_requirement.flat_topology_fatal: Flat R2 has no between-ring structure, no curvature, no holonomy
cell_complex_requirement.torus_levels: Different theta values = different 'levels' of the nested torus
cell_complex_requirement.conclusion: Transport requires cell complex with between-ring edges. Flat topology is KILLED.

bell_state_LR.conclusion: Bell state: both reduced states maximally mixed (Bloch origin). Max entanglement = max uncertainty about each subsystem individually. The L/R bipartition is what MAKES this meaningful.

separable_LR.conclusion: Separable L/R state: each subsystem is pure. EE = 0. L and R are individually well-defined.

sy_sy_structure.conclusion: sy x sy is the double charge conjugation. Its eigenvalues split the 4D space into +1 and -1 eigenspaces = the chirality sectors. This is the NATURAL bipartition operator.

bipartition_significance.without_chirality: 2-qubit Hilbert space C4 has no preferred tensor decomposition
bipartition_significance.with_chirality: L/R chirality DEFINES the tensor product C2_L x C2_R
bipartition_significance.consequence: Entanglement entropy, concurrence, negativity, discord all become physically meaningful (not just mathematically defined)
bipartition_significance.conclusion: Chirality creates the bipartition. Entanglement measures REQUIRE this bipartition. L3 makes entanglement physical, not just mathematical.

z3_which_pauli.conclusion: z3 proves: antisymmetry constraint selects ONLY sigma_y. sigma_x and sigma_z are symmetric -> cannot serve as time-reversal operator. Concurrence MUST use sigma_y. This is forced by chirality.

z3_uniqueness.conclusion: Antisymmetry in su(2) forces a=0, c=0. Only sigma_y direction survives. This is UNIQUE (up to scalar). sigma_y IS chirality.

numerical_verification.conclusion: Numerically confirmed: sy^T = -sy, sx^T = sx, sz^T = sz. sigma_y is the UNIQUE antisymmetric Pauli.

deep_connection.epsilon_is_area_form: epsilon is the volume/area form on C2
deep_connection.chirality_is_antisymmetry: L/R distinction = antisymmetric structure on spinor space
deep_connection.entanglement_needs_chirality: Concurrence = |<psi | (C x C) |psi>| where C = i*sy*K
deep_connection.conclusion: The chain: chirality -> antisymmetry -> sigma_y -> concurrence formula. This is not a choice, it is FORCED by the constraint structure.

pseudoscalar.conclusion: e123^2 = -1. Pseudoscalar is a square root of -1 in the algebra.

vector_pseudoscalar_commutation.note: In Cl(3,0), e123 COMMUTES with vectors (3 is odd). For true chirality (anticommutation), need Cl(3,1) or Cl(1,3) where gamma_5 anticommutes.

chirality_projectors.conclusion: PL and PR are orthogonal projectors: PL^2=PL, PR^2=PR, PL*PR=0, PL+PR=1. They split the algebra into L and R chirality sectors.

chirality_decomposition.conclusion: Any multivector decomposes into L and R chiral parts. This is the algebraic origin of the L/R bipartition.

survival_table.L3_detail: rho decomposes into L and R chirality sectors via sigma_y conjugation. rho_tilde = sy*rho^T*sy gives the chirally-conjugated state. Chirality adds structure: rho lives in L sector, rho_tilde in R sector.
Charge conjugation C maps Bloch vector r -> -r (antipodal). L/R chirality IS the antipodal map on S2. Every Bloch point has a unique chiral partner at -r.
Stokes S1,S2,S3 have natural chirality: S -> -S under C. L/R circular polarization IS chirality in optics.
d=2 eigenstates |e1>, |e2> are chirally conjugate: C|e1> = e^{i*phi}|e2>. Eigendecomposition respects L/R structure.
Wigner function under C: W(r) -> W(-r). Chirality = parity of Wigner function. L/R constraint forces specific negativity patterns.
Husimi Q(r) -> Q(-r) under chirality. Always non-negative, but pattern constrained.
Coherence vector = Bloch vector in su(2) basis. C: r -> -r. Chirality acts as the CENTRAL element of su(2).

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: purification in L x R
survival_table.L3_detail: Purification of rho in C2 lives in C2_L x C2_R. The purifying system IS the chiral partner. Chirality makes purification physically meaningful.
Characteristic function chi(r) -> chi(-r) under chirality. Symmetric pattern.
S(rho_L) = S(rho_R) for purifications. Chirality guarantees symmetric entropy. von Neumann entropy respects L/R symmetry.
Renyi entropy invariant under chirality (depends on eigenvalues only). L/R adds no new constraint beyond L2.
Tsallis entropy invariant under chirality. Eigenvalue-dependent only.
Min entropy invariant under chirality.
Max entropy = log(2) = 1 bit. Invariant.
Linear entropy = 1-Tr(rho^2). Chirality-invariant.
PR invariant under chirality. Eigenvalue-only.
S(rho||sigma) != S(rho||C(sigma)) in general. Relative entropy distinguishes a state from its chiral conjugate.

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: negative iff entangled across L/R
survival_table.L3_detail: S(L|R) < 0 iff L and R are entangled. Chirality bipartition makes this physical. Conditional entropy = entanglement witness in L/R split.
Mutual information I(L:R) = S(rho_L) + S(rho_R) - S(rho_LR). Chirality makes this the TOTAL correlation between chiral sectors.

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: quantum channel capacity across L/R
survival_table.L3_detail: I_c = S(rho_R) - S(rho_LR). Positive iff quantum info can flow L->R. Chirality gives this a physical direction.
Entanglement entropy is defined BY the bipartition. L/R chirality provides the NATURAL bipartition. EE becomes the entanglement between chiral sectors.
C preserves Fubini-Study distance: d_FS(psi, phi) = d_FS(C(psi), C(phi)). Chirality is an ISOMETRY of the state space geometry.
Bures distance chirality-invariant for pure states. Mixed state case more complex.

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: REQUIRES closed base loop + fiber transport
survival_table.L3_detail: Berry phase = holonomy of Hopf connection along CLOSED BASE LOOP. REQUIRES fiber/base distinction (test a). REQUIRES transport mechanism. Open paths killed. Chirality: Berry phase of C(gamma) = -Berry phase of gamma.
Im(QGT) = Berry curvature = monopole. Chirality: curvature changes sign under C. QGT requires base-loop structure for curvature interpretation.
HS distance = Euclidean in Bloch ball. Chirality-invariant (||r-(-r)|| = 2||r||).
Trace distance chirality-invariant at d=2.
Z-dephasing kills xy Bloch components. This breaks the C symmetry (C maps z->-z, so z-dephasing treats L and R differently). Chirality-BREAKING channel.
X-dephasing kills yz Bloch components. Breaks C symmetry.
Depolarizing maps rho -> (1-p)rho + p*I/2. This commutes with C (isotropic). ONLY depolarizing among Pauli channels preserves chirality.
AD drives |1>->|0> (north pole). Maximal C-breaking: picks one chirality sector. The ASYMMETRY of AD is chirality-breaking.
Phase damping = z-dephasing. Breaks chirality.
Bit flip uses sigma_x. Breaks chirality (sx commutes with C differently than sy).
Phase flip uses sigma_z. Breaks chirality.
Bit-phase flip uses sigma_y = the charge conjugation operator. This channel IS chirality-flip. It maps L<->R. Unique among Pauli channels.
SU(2) rotations = SO(3) on Bloch sphere. Preserve Berry connection. Transport via unitary = parallel transport along generated base path.
Z-measurement projects to |0> or |1>. These are chirally conjugate: C|0>=|1>, C|1>=-|0>. Measurement selects a chirality sector.

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: chirality FORCES the formula (test f)
survival_table.L3_detail: Concurrence uses rho_tilde = (sy x sy) rho* (sy x sy). z3 proves: sy is the UNIQUE antisymmetric Pauli. Chirality FORCES concurrence to use sigma_y. Not a convention, a constraint.
Partial transpose on R subsystem: transpose = time-reversal on R. In L/R split, PT detects chirality-crossing entanglement. PPT iff separable at 2x2.
MI measures total (classical + quantum) correlation between L and R sectors.
Discord = MI minus classical correlations. In L/R split, discord measures purely quantum chirality correlation. Analytical formula at d=2.
EoF = h((1+sqrt(1-C^2))/2). C uses sigma_y (chirality-forced). The entire entanglement quantification chain flows through chirality.
CNOT creates entanglement between L and R qubits. In chirality basis, CNOT correlates chiral sectors. Weyl chamber vertex = max L/R entangling.
CZ = locally equivalent to CNOT. Same chirality entangling properties.
SWAP exchanges qubit 1 and qubit 2 = exchanges L and R sectors. In chirality basis, SWAP IS the chirality exchange operator.
H maps |0> -> |+>, |1> -> |->. Mixes the z-chirality eigenstates into x-chirality eigenstates. Rotation between measurement bases.
T = diag(1, e^{i*pi/4}). Adds relative phase between |0> and |1> = relative phase between chiral eigenstates. This IS fiber rotation.
iSWAP = SWAP with i phase. Exchanges L/R AND adds Berry-like phase. Combines chirality exchange with fiber rotation.
Schmidt decomposition of |psi> in L x R: |psi> = sum_i s_i |L_i>|R_i>. Chirality: R_i = C(L_i). Schmidt basis IS the chirality-conjugate basis.
SVD at d=2 unchanged by L3. 2 singular values.
Spectral decomposition: rho = p|e1><e1| + (1-p)|e2><e2|. C maps e1 <-> e2 (chirality exchange). Eigenvalues respect this.
rho = (I + r.sigma)/2. The sy coefficient = chirality content. Under C: (rx,ry,rz) -> (-rx,-ry,-rz). The Pauli decomposition separates chirality-even (I) from chirality-odd (Paulis).

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: Cartan params = chirality entangling angles
survival_table.L3_detail: KAK: U = (K1 x K2) * exp(i*(c1*XX+c2*YY+c3*ZZ)) * (K3 x K4). Cartan parameters c1,c2,c3 measure HOW MUCH the gate entangles L and R. The YY term uses sigma_y = chirality operator.
l1 coherence = 2|c| where c is off-diagonal element. Off-diagonal elements MIX chirality eigenstates |0> and |1>. Coherence IS chirality mixing.
REC = S(diag(rho)) - S(rho). Diagonal = chirality eigenstates. REC measures how far rho is from being in a definite chirality state.
Wigner negativity pattern constrained by chirality: W(r) vs W(-r) relation.

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: fiber loop IS gauge loop in transport
survival_table.L3_detail: The S1 fiber coordinate chi parameterizes gauge freedom. Transport along base loops SHIFTS chi by Berry phase. Fiber loop and base loop are COUPLED by the Hopf connection (L3 transport).
Hopf invariant = 1 (two fibers linked). Computing linking number requires transport around loops. L3 transport makes this MEASURABLE.

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: curvature changes sign under chirality
survival_table.L3_detail: Berry curvature F = sin(theta)/2 dtheta^dphi. Under C (theta->pi-theta): F -> -F. Monopole curvature is CHIRALITY-ODD. L and R see opposite monopole charge.

survival_table.L3_effect: ENHANCED: connection IS the transport mechanism
survival_table.L3_detail: Hopf connection A = (1-cos(theta))/2 dphi IS the parallel transport rule. L3 transport is DEFINED by this connection. Connection + chirality = full L3.
Berry phase = Omega/2 quantized by c1=1. Requires CLOSED loop (test a). Under chirality: phase -> -phase (L and R get opposite Berry phases).

chirality_operator_C.formula: C = i * sigma_y * K (K = complex conjugation)
chirality_operator_C.on_states: C maps |psi><psi| to C|psi><psi|C^dagger = unique orthogonal pure state

chiral_overlap.formula: Tr(rho * C(rho)) where C(rho) = sigma_y * rho^T * sigma_y
chiral_overlap.physical: Measures how much a mixed state overlaps with its chiral conjugate

chiral_current.physical: Measures L/R asymmetry. Zero for real states. Maximal for circular polarization.

berry_holonomy_operator.formula: U_Berry = exp(-i * Berry_phase) as operator on fiber
berry_holonomy_operator.physical: Holonomy operator from parallel transport around closed base loop

chirality_bipartition_marker.formula: The L/R split itself as a structural lego
chirality_bipartition_marker.description: C2 = C2_L tensor C2_R where R = C(L)
chirality_bipartition_marker.physical: The tensor product structure ITSELF, not just a measure on it

summary.headline: L3 complete. 61 survived (0 killed, 5 NEW created by chirality). 40 enhanced, 21 constrained. 11 require fiber/base, 37 require chirality, 14 enhanced by loop structure.
key_findings: Chirality (L/R anti-alignment) is the PRIMARY new constraint at L3.
Charge conjugation C = i*sigma_y*K maps every state to its unique orthogonal partner.
C^2 = -I on spinors (fermionic sign). Bloch_L . Bloch_R = -1 ALWAYS.
z3 PROVES: antisymmetry selects ONLY sigma_y. Concurrence formula is FORCED, not chosen.
Berry phase REQUIRES closed base loop. Open path versions are gauge-dependent (killed).
Transport requires curved (non-flat) topology. Flat R^n is killed.
L/R chirality creates the NATURAL bipartition for entanglement measures.
bit_phase_flip channel uses sigma_y = IS the chirality flip.
Depolarizing is the ONLY Pauli channel preserving chirality symmetry.
5 new legos: chirality_operator_C, chiral_overlap, chiral_current, berry_holonomy_operator, chirality_bipartition_marker.
